name: hermes-deployer
description: One-click Hermes Agent deployer via Telegram Mini App

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @hermes/shared && npm run build --workspace @hermes/backend && npm run build --workspace @hermes/frontend
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @hermes/shared && concurrently -n shared,backend,frontend -c green,blue,magenta "npm:dev:shared" "npm:dev:backend" "npm:dev:frontend"
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/backend/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/frontend/tsconfig.json
